blockdesc-temporalmotor: The heart of a portable stonecutter. Powered by a temporal gear, providing high RPM for stable rotation of the saw blade.
itemdesc-sawguard-*: A protective casing element designed for safe operation with high-speed stonecutter blades.
itemdesc-sawhandle-*: A sturdy handle that allows holding the stonecutter securely with two hands while sawing.
itemdesc-sawrotor: An internal mechanical component of the motor that transfers torque to the saw blade shaft.
itemdesc-stonecutter_empty-*: A fully assembled tool body with a motor and a handle. <font color="#e5a65d">Requires a saw blade to be installed in the crafting grid to function!</font>
itemdesc-stonecutter-*:
A portable tool for quick sawing of stone blocks on site.
Instructions: Hold the tool in your hands, approach any rock block, and hold LMB to start the blade.
